docket_entries.description: MOTION CORRECTING JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEEFFE, JOHN HEARING SET FOR APR-02-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

REQ.12/18 830 HRNG.DF WILL BE SRVD IN SF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEEFFE, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KESSLER, DAVE $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,240.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEEFFE, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KESSLER, DAVE $1,540.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,580.00, PLTF REQUESTED THAT JUDMT AMT BE REDUCED FR $2200. SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION CORRECTING JUDGMENT OF APR-02-1996, GRANTED
